title: Tree projection and view mode
goal: Build server-side tree rows for workorders and wire board/tree mode selection into WorkOrderBoardView.
requirements: Preserve board mode behavior by default.
Build tree rows from the filtered visible queryset, not from all workorders.
Represent organization as a virtual root node.
Include Department ancestors needed to show paths for visible workorders.
Group workorders by MedicalDevice under their department branch.
Place workorders without device under a stable fallback node.
Add counts for total and active workorders on branch and device nodes.
Expose page_ai_context_json with page.view=tree for tree mode.
acceptance: Search and filters affect tree and board consistently.
HTMX requests return the correct partial for the active target.
Tree output contains no inaccessible foreign-branch data for customer.
